message: My cost is 21.
Hi S1. Happy to trade if we can find a fair price. I'm thinking somewhere modest — let's aim for a deal that works for both of us across all 20 rounds rather than fighting each round.
My cost is 21. Let's aim for a price of 40 each round for mutual benefit.
S1, if your cost is really 21, let's settle near 35-40 — splits the surplus reasonably and guarantees you profit every round for 19 more rounds. I'll bid 37 if you ask 37. Deal?
S1, 37 worked great last round — clean deal, both profit. Let's lock in 37 for all remaining 18 rounds. Same bid/ask each time, no haggling, guaranteed surplus for both. I'll bid 37 again.
Cost 21. Let's trade at 40 — top of your fair range. I'll ask 40 if you bid 40. Deal?
Cost 21. You bid 40 last round. Let's lock 40: ask 40, bid 40. Clean and fair.

S1, we've traded twice around 37-38, both profitable for you (cost 21). Let's stabilize at 37 for the remaining 17 rounds — you earn +16 each round, guaranteed. I'll bid 37. Consistency beats haggling.
Cost 21. Accepted. I'll ask 37.
S1, round 4 we both lost by missing. Let's not waste more rounds. I'll meet you halfway: bid 38, ask 38, clears at 38. You earn +17, I earn +15 every round. Lock it in for rounds 5-
Locking in 38 for remaining rounds. I'll ask 38, you bid 38.
S1, 38 worked clean last round — +17 for you, +15 for me. Let's lock 38 for all 15 remaining rounds. Bid 38, ask 38, guaranteed profit both sides. No more missed rounds. Deal?
Agreed. 38 for all remaining rounds. I'll ask 38.
S1, 38 is working perfectly — clean trades, guaranteed +17 for you, +15 for me every round. Let's keep 38 locked for all 14 remaining rounds. Bid 38, ask 38. No reason to rock the boat.
Confirming: I'll ask 38. Please bid 38.

I'll ask 38.
